text.title: Active Listening Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by channel + stakes + role to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — agent cannot execute live listening; hand off to a human
generate script with explicit 'anything to add?' substitute for the silence cue
include at least one Level 5 reflective prompt + run assumption scan
generate standard RASA script + run validator

text.example: role=prep-or-postpass → channel=live → stakes=medium → conclusion rasa-full-cycle → emit standard script and validate.
